new_terms.context: Distributes inlet coolant to modules and collects outlet coolant within the chassis.
Universal Quick Disconnect; used for coolant entry/exit at the chassis level.
Upgraded cold plate for Rubin GPU with reduced channel pitch for better thermal dissipation.
Manufacturing stages; shifting cold plate attachment from system integration (L10) to board-level (L6).
Power components on the board that require cooling via the cold plate.
Housing for optical transceivers on the Orchid module covered by the cold plate.
Next-generation Nvidia hardware components mentioned in the thermal design.
